regions.name: Stockholm
regions.bestTimeToVisit: Visit from May to September for pleasant weather and the midnight sun phenomenon.

regions.name: Uppsala and Gävleborg
regions.bestTimeToVisit: Best visited from June to August when the historic sites and surrounding nature are most accessible.

regions.name: West Coast
regions.bestTimeToVisit: Visit from June to August for warm weather, coastal activities, and the seafood season.

regions.name: Southern Sweden
regions.bestTimeToVisit: Best from May to September when the countryside is green and coastal areas are warmest.

regions.name: East Coast
regions.bestTimeToVisit: Visit from June to August to enjoy the archipelago, coastal towns, and summer weather.

regions.name: Central Sweden
regions.bestTimeToVisit: Best visited from June to September to experience forests, lakes, and outdoor activities.

regions.name: Dalarna
regions.bestTimeToVisit: Visit from June to September for outdoor activities, or December for traditional Christmas traditions.

regions.name: Norrbotten
regions.bestTimeToVisit: Visit from December to February for the northern lights, or June to August for the midnight sun.

regions.name: Västerbotten
regions.bestTimeToVisit: Best from June to August for summer activities, or December to February for winter sports and northern lights.

regions.name: Jämtland and Härjedalen
regions.bestTimeToVisit: Visit from December to March for skiing, or June to August for hiking and mountain activities.

regions.name: Värmland
regions.bestTimeToVisit: Visit from June to August for lake activities and outdoor adventures in this scenic region.

regions.name: Gotland
regions.bestTimeToVisit: Best from May to September for beach weather, sea activities, and the island's medieval charm.
